name: LLM Agent Chat
description: LLM-backed transition function for agents. Maintains conversation history in agent state (state.config for llmOperation/model/systemPrompt/url, state.history for conversation). Invokes the configured level 3 grid operation for LLM calls — credentials are resolved by the level 3 operation from the user's secret store.

state.description: Previous conversation state (null on first run). Contains 'config' map (llmOperation, model, systemPrompt, url) and 'history' array of role/content pairs.

messages.description: Inbox messages to process as user turns

state.description: Updated conversation state with appended history

result.description: Contains 'response' with the assistant's reply text
